'''dhahuyu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:tabi|tabi]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-h-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tabi|tabi]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| dhahuyu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhæhiyith|dhæhiyith]] || [[word:dhæhiyij|dhæhiyij]] || [[word:dhæhiyish|dhæhiyish]] || [[word:dhæhiyi|dhæhiyi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhahuhuyuth|dhahuhuyuth]] || [[word:dhahuhuyuj|dhahuhuyuj]] || [[word:dhahuhuyush|dhahuhuyush]] || [[word:dhahuhuyu|dhahuhuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhahuyuth|dhahuyuth]] || [[word:dhahuyuj|dhahuyuj]] || [[word:dhahuyush|dhahuyush]] || [[word:dhahuyu|dhahuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhahufyuth|dhahufyuth]] || [[word:dhahufyuj|dhahufyuj]] || [[word:dhahufyush|dhahufyush]] || [[word:dhahufyuf|dhahufyuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhahuyuthu|dhahuyuthu]] || [[word:dhahuyuju|dhahuyuju]] || [[word:dhahuyushu|dhahuyushu]] || [[word:dhahuyuku|dhahuyuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhahuyuth|dhahuyuth]] || [[word:dhahuyuj|dhahuyuj]] || [[word:dhahuyush|dhahuyush]] || [[word:dhahuyu|dhahuyu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhahuyuthul|dhahuyuthul]] || [[word:dhahuyujul|dhahuyujul]] || [[word:dhahuyushul|dhahuyushul]] || [[word:dhahuyukul|dhahuyukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhahuyuthuthu|dhahuyuthuthu]] || [[word:dhahuyujuju|dhahuyujuju]] || [[word:dhahuyushushu|dhahuyushushu]] || [[word:dhahuyuku|dhahuyuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhahuyuthun|dhahuyuthun]] || [[word:dhahuyujun|dhahuyujun]] || [[word:dhahuyushun|dhahuyushun]] || [[word:dhahuyukun|dhahuyukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhahuyuthuoro|dhahuyuthuoro]] || [[word:dhahuyujuoro|dhahuyujuoro]] || [[word:dhahuyushuoro|dhahuyushuoro]] || [[word:dhahuyukuoro|dhahuyukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
